    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractDAO<T>
    This class handles the CRUD operations in a reflexive way.
    Bill
    This models the Bill record.
    BillBLL
    This class handles the business logic for creating the BILL logs.
    BillController
     
    BillDAO
    This class handles the CRUD operations for the Log table.
    BillView
     
    Client
    This models the Client Class.
    ClientBLL
    This class handles the business logic and validation for client operations.
    ClientController
     
    ClientDAO
    This class handles the CRUD operations for clients.
    ClientView
     
    ConnectionFactory
    This class handles the database connection
    GenericNameValidator<T>
    This class handles the generic validation of Strings not being Empty.
    MainMenu
     
    Order
    This models the Order Class.
    OrderBLL
    This class handles the business logic and validation for order operations.
    OrderController
     
    OrderDAO
    This class handles the CRUD operations for orders.
    OrderItem
    This models the OrderItem Class.
    OrderItemDAO
    This class handles the CRUD operations for orderItems.
    OrderView
     
    PositiveNumberValidator<T>
    This class handles the generic validation of numbers being positive.
    Product
    This models the Product Class.
    ProductBLL
    This class handles the business logic and validation for products operations.
    ProductController
     
    ProductDAO
    This class handles the CRUD operations for products.
    ProductView
     
    Start
     
    TableFactory
     
    Validator<T>
    Validator interface
